level_load_pipeline: GameModeCallback @0x8007E654 detects level-complete (state+0x146 set AND lives[0x11]==0 -> game over, else advance)
SeekToLevelInSequence @0x80...38255 walks the PLAYBACK SEQUENCE (header+0xf34) to find next entry
InitializeAndLoadLevel: LevelDataParser -> LoadAssetContainer (per segment) -> UploadAudioToSPU x2 -> LoadLevelSpriteAssets

playback_sequence.entry_mode_byte: +0xf36: 0x01=MOVIE, 0x03=LEVEL — levels and FMVs interleaved in ONE sequence
playback_sequence.movie_match: FUN_8007a4c0 strcmp vs Movie Table @ header+0xb64 (13 x 0x1c, 4-char IDs DREA/LOGO/YNTS/...)

level_metadata_entry.+0x0C: level asset index byte (the stage id)
level_metadata_entry.rest: TOC sizes / sector info / per-stage flags

segment_structure.note: LevelDataContext ctx[] zeroed/populated by LoadAssetContainer; matches asset-types.md
segment_structure.primary: shared bank: Asset 600 geometry/bg + 601 audio + 602 (loaded once)
segment_structure.dual_audio_upload: UploadAudioToSPU called for PRIMARY then SECONDARY bank (Session 14) — why some sounds are global, others level-specific

shared_sprite_set.array: DAT_8009dab4 = zero-terminated array of sprite HASHES loaded to VRAM EVERY level (LoadSpriteHashArrayToVRAM @0x...4105)
shared_sprite_set.note: sprite analog of the audio primary bank — the always-resident core sprites. VALUES in .data segment (not in .c dump).
shared_sprite_set.conditional: LoadLevelSpriteAssets also loads 0x168254b5 (Projectile sprite) when a level flag is set

special_levels: Asset 100 +0x1A special-level-id 99 = FINN/SEVN (3D/vehicle stages); FINN/RUNN use Asset 504 vehicle paths (78/1 waypoints)
